summary: TWO_COLUMN: input plane with ValueTracker-driven point x = (x₁, x₂) on left; output plane with image Ax on right plus persistent yellow trail tracking every visited image. 8 sequential (x₁, x₂) targets sweep out the full column space ℝ². Live equation A·x = x₁·a₁ + x₂·a₂ updates each frame.
